results.title: UP Police Constable Admit Card 2026 Out: How to download hall ticket online?
results.description: The Uttar Pradesh Police Recruitment and Promotion Board (UPPRPB) has officially issued the UP Police Constable Admit Card 2026 on June 4. Eligible candidates can access and download their respective admit cards by visiting the official website at uppbpb.gov.in.

results.title: India new T20 captain LIVE Updates: Gambhir ready to work with Iyer and Tilak in leadership group, says report

results.title: Nasha Mukht J&K Abhiyan: Anantnag Police conduct anti-narcotic raids in Pahalgam hotels
results.description: Anantnag, June 05: In a major crackdown against drug trafficking and substance abuse, Anantnag Police on Friday carried out extensive anti-narcotic raids in several hotels across the Pahalgam Sub-Division. The operation was conducted in the Mavoora, Rafting Point and Yanner areas by six dedicated police teams under the supervision of the SDPO Pahalgam. Acting on credible inputs, the teams searched multiple hotel premises to prevent the misuse of tourist accommodations for narcotics-related activities and to strengthen surveillance against drug networks operating in the region. Police said the raids were part of an ongoing campaign aimed at curbing the drug menace and ensuring a safe and secure environment for residents as well as tourists. Reiterating its commitment to a drug-free society, Anantnag Police stated that such proactive enforcement measures will continue across the district to dismantle drug trafficking networks and prevent the spread of substance abuse.(KNC)

results.title: Certification for cycle-friendly campuses introduced
results.description: NEW DELHI, JUN 4 (PTI): The Sports Ministry on Thursday said it has introduced a certification system for cycle-friendly institutions or cycle-only campuses and the likes of National Defence Academy(NDA) and the Indian Military Academy will be felicitated for their “sustainable mobility practices” here on Sunday.The felicitation will take place during the ‘Sundays on Cycle’ [...] The post Certification for cycle-friendly campuses introduced first appeared on Nagaland Post .

results.title: Explained - The policy change to overseas individuals investing in Indian Equities
results.description: Currently, Non-Resident Indians (NRIs) and Overseas Citizens of India (OCIs) have specific, streamlined routes to invest in Indian equity markets without needing a full SEBI registration.
